Why Use This Bizarre Lineage Wiki?

Most Bizarre Lineage guides online are buried in ads, outdated, or incomplete. We built this Bizarre Lineage wiki differently — every data point comes straight from in-game testing, every tier list ranking is backed by leaderboard statistics, and every page loads instantly with zero bloat.

Whether you just started playing Bizarre Lineage or you are grinding for your third bizarre lineage prestige, this hub gives you the competitive edge. Browse our Bizarre Lineage stands database for raw stats, check the Bizarre Lineage tier list to pick the strongest Stand for your playstyle, and never miss a free reward with our Bizarre Lineage codes tracker.

Bizarre Lineage FAQ

Common questions from the Bizarre Lineage community — answered by experienced players.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is Bizarre Lineage on Roblox?

Bizarre Lineage is a popular Roblox experience inspired by JoJo's Bizarre Adventure. Players collect and fight with Stands, equip fighting styles, and unlock sub-abilities to dominate PvP arenas and PvE quests. Our Bizarre Lineage wiki covers every mechanic in detail.

When do new Bizarre Lineage codes drop?

Developers typically release new Bizarre Lineage codes during major holidays, player milestones like 50k concurrent users, or large content updates. Bookmark our Bizarre Lineage codes page — we update it within minutes of every new drop.

Which Bizarre Lineage Stand is best for leveling from 1-50?

For fastest PvE leveling in Bizarre Lineage, choose a Stand with large AoE damage such as Whitesnake or Magician's Red. Pair them with Boxing or Vampire for maximum sustain. See our Bizarre Lineage leveling guide for the complete route.

How do I awaken my Stand in Bizarre Lineage?

To awaken a Stand in Bizarre Lineage, reach max Level 50, obtain a Requiem Arrow from boss drops or redeem codes, and complete the final story quest. Our Bizarre Lineage awakening guide has step-by-step boss strategies.

How many Stands are in Bizarre Lineage?

There are currently 17 unique Stands in Bizarre Lineage, ranging from Common rarity to Mythical. Each Stand has its own moveset, passive ability, and recommended fighting style pairing. Browse every Stand in our Bizarre Lineage stands database.

Ready to Dominate Bizarre Lineage?

Pick your Stand, optimize your build, and start climbing the leaderboard today.
